page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.cm4.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an Intel Xeon E5-2667 v4 processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The instance provides 8 dedicated physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, paired with 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include bundled local storage or GPU hardware, and it delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a moderate capability profile. The instance achieves average results in single-core Geekbench, PassMark CPU, and software compilation tests. However, multi-core processing and raw computational throughput, as measured by stress-ng, fall into the lower 25th percentile. Memory read bandwidth is average, but write operations on large blocks show weaker performance. Cryptographic and physics calculations also register in the bottom 25% tier.

In terms of workload execution, the instance performs adequately for static web serving, Redis SET operations, and database tasks, all scoring in the average tier. It is capable of handling lightweight language model inference for small 135M parameter models, though performance drops significantly to the bottom 10% for medium 7B models. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for legacy general-purpose applications, development environments, and moderate database workloads that do not require high-speed local NVMe storage or intensive multi-threaded compute.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.cm4.2xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance featuring 8 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2667 v4 processor running at 3.2 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it is equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Benchmark data shows average performance in single-core tasks, software compilation, and database operations, though multi-core compute and memory write speeds are relatively weak. It is best suited for moderate workloads such as static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose database applications that do not demand high-performance local storage or intensive parallel processing.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.cm4.2xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance with 8 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and a 3 Gbps network baseline, suitable for moderate database and web serving workloads.

tagline: A dedicated eight-core general-purpose virtual machine with balanced memory allocation for standard web serving and database workloads.
